title: clinopodium fruticosum
intro: Clinopodium fruticosum, also known as creeping savory or summer savory, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) characterized by its woody stems and small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clinopodium fruticosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Clinopodium fruticosum can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
